heroDescription: Most marketing agencies and automation consultants work across dozens of industries. They can build you a funnel or set up a CRM, but they do not understand why busy season matters, what a month end close looks like, or how compliance deadlines shape your entire year. We work exclusively with {audience}, and that focus shapes everything we do.

benefits.title: Industry Specialization You Can Feel
benefits.description: When your automation partner understands the difference between tax prep and advisory, or knows why January through April changes everything, the solutions they deliver just work better. You spend less time explaining your business and more time seeing results that make sense for your practice.

benefits.title: No Translation Layer Required
benefits.description: With a general agency, you often find yourself teaching them about your industry before any real work gets done. benefits.title: Managed Systems That Produce Measurable Outcomes
benefits.description: Community and education are powerful, but at some point you need systems that run and results you can measure. SmartFirm provides CPAs with a managed platform that generates leads, nurtures prospects, and tracks the outcomes so you can see what your marketing investment is actually producing. This complements any educational resources you have benefited from by adding the execution layer.

benefits.title: A Partner Focused on Your Individual Practice Results
benefits.description: Community-based programs are designed to serve a broad audience with shared learning experiences. SmartFirm works with your practice individually, building custom systems based on your specific services, target clients, and growth goals. This personalized approach means the solutions you get are tailored to your situation rather than adapted from general best practices.

features.title: Custom Marketing Systems Built for Your CPA Practice
features.description: SmartFirm does not offer a one-size-fits-all program or a set of courses to work through on your own. We build a marketing and automation system customized to your practice, including the specific services you want to promote, the types of clients you want to attract, and the workflow that fits your team. This personalized build means the system reflects your practice from day one.
details: Customized lead generation strategy based on your ideal client profile and service mix
Automation workflows designed around how your specific practice operates
Content and messaging developed to reflect your firm's voice and positioning

features.title: End-to-End Client Acquisition Infrastructure
features.description: SmartFirm provides the full infrastructure needed to attract, nurture, and convert prospective clients. From the moment someone discovers your practice online through to their first engagement, every step is supported by automation and tracked for performance. This end-to-end approach ensures nothing falls through the cracks in your client acquisition process.
details: Lead capture mechanisms integrated across your digital presence
Multi-channel follow-up automation that stays in touch with prospects until they are ready to move forward
Conversion tracking that shows you exactly how prospects become clients

features.title: Ongoing Optimization and Strategic Guidance
features.description: Building a system is just the starting point. SmartFirm continuously monitors your marketing performance and makes data-driven adjustments to improve results over time. You also receive strategic guidance from a team that works exclusively with accounting professionals, so the advice you get is grounded in real experience with practices similar to yours.
details: Continuous performance monitoring with proactive adjustments to campaigns and workflows
Regular strategy sessions to discuss results and plan for the next phase of growth
Access to insights from across our client base about what is working for CPAs right now

faqs.question: Is SmartFirm a replacement for We Are PF, or can we use both?
faqs.answer: SmartFirm and We Are PF serve different purposes, and many CPAs could benefit from both. We Are PF provides community, education, and inspiration around modern marketing approaches. SmartFirm provides the implementation and management of the actual systems that put those ideas into practice. If you value what you have learned from the PF community, SmartFirm can be the execution partner that helps you turn that knowledge into operational results.

faqs.question: We already have a brand identity from working with another creative partner. Can SmartFirm work with that?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. SmartFirm is not a branding or creative agency. We build marketing and automation systems. If you already have a strong brand identity, visual guidelines, or messaging framework, we incorporate those into the system we build for you. Our focus is on the infrastructure that drives client acquisition, and we are happy to work within the brand you have already established.

faqs.question: How does SmartFirm measure success for a CPA practice?
faqs.answer: We measure success based on the outcomes that matter to your practice, such as the number of qualified leads generated, consultations booked, and new clients acquired. While we track supporting metrics like website traffic and email engagement, our primary focus is on the business results that directly impact your revenue. We share this data with you regularly so you always know how your system is performing.

alternative-to-we-are-pf-for-cpas.ctaTitle: Ready to Turn Marketing Ideas Into a Working System?
alternative-to-we-are-pf-for-cpas.ctaDescription: Book a free strategy call and we will show you how SmartFirm can build the marketing and automation infrastructure your CPA practice needs to turn great ideas into consistent client growth.

rootworks-alternative-with-implementatio.heroSubtitleTemplate: Rootworks has helped accounting firms think strategically about modernizing their practices through coaching and advisory programs. If your firm is looking for a partner that goes beyond the advisory stage and actually builds and manages the marketing and automation systems for you, SmartFirm's implementation-focused model may be the right fit.
rootworks-alternative-with-implementatio.heroDescription: Rootworks has earned respect in the accounting profession for its coaching programs and strategic advisory services that help firms modernize their approach to business development, technology adoption, and practice management. That kind of strategic thinking is valuable, and many firms have benefited from the framework Rootworks provides. Where some firms find a gap, however, is in the transition from strategy to execution. Knowing what to do and actually having the systems built, configured, launched, and managed on an ongoing basis are two very different things. SmartFirm focuses specifically on that implementation layer. We take the strategic vision, whether you developed it on your own, with a coach, or with our team, and turn it into a working marketing and automation system that operates day in and day out for your accounting firm.

benefits.title: Strategy That Comes With Built-In Execution
benefits.description: Many accounting firms invest in strategic advisory programs and come away with a clear plan but no one to execute it. SmartFirm combines strategic planning with hands-on implementation, so the marketing and automation strategy we develop together becomes a functioning system rather than a document that sits in a shared drive. For firms that want both the roadmap and the builder, this integrated approach can save months of time.

benefits.title: A Fully Managed System, Not a Coaching Program
benefits.description: Coaching programs are designed to teach you how to do something. SmartFirm is designed to do it for you. If your accounting firm wants a marketing and automation system that runs without requiring your team to learn new platforms, manage campaigns, or troubleshoot technical issues, our managed model delivers that. You focus on running your practice while we focus on running your growth engine.

benefits.title: Tangible Results You Can Measure From the Start
benefits.description: Advisory and coaching programs often deliver their value over a longer time horizon as your team absorbs and applies the learning. SmartFirm's implementation model is designed to produce measurable results relatively quickly because we are building and launching working systems from the beginning of the engagement. Most firms begin seeing lead generation activity within weeks of going live.

features.title: Complete Marketing and Automation Build-Out
features.description: SmartFirm does not hand you a playbook and wish you well. Our team builds your entire marketing and automation system from the ground up, including your website, landing pages, lead capture forms, email and text sequences, CRM configuration, review management, and reporting dashboards. Every component is customized for your accounting firm and designed to work together as an integrated system.
details: Full website and landing page build optimized for accounting firm client acquisition
CRM setup with custom pipelines that reflect how your firm manages prospects and clients
Automated communication workflows for lead nurture, onboarding, and client retention

features.title: Hands-On Launch and Ongoing Management
features.description: Once your system is built, SmartFirm does not step away. Our team manages the launch process, monitors early performance, and makes adjustments to optimize results. This ongoing management continues beyond the initial launch, so your system remains effective as market conditions shift and your practice evolves. You always have a team behind the scenes keeping things running smoothly.
details: Managed launch process with performance monitoring during the critical early weeks
Ongoing campaign management including content updates, audience adjustments, and budget optimization
Regular performance reporting with clear explanations of what the data means for your firm

features.title: Implementation That Respects Your Firm's Pace
features.description: Every accounting firm is different, and some are ready to move quickly while others need a more measured approach. SmartFirm's implementation process is flexible enough to match your firm's pace and priorities. Whether you want to launch everything at once or roll out capabilities in phases, we design the implementation timeline around what works for your team and your calendar.
details: Flexible implementation timelines that can be compressed or extended based on your preferences
Phased rollout options that let you prioritize the capabilities that matter most to your firm right now
Regular check-ins to ensure the pace of implementation feels right and your team is comfortable

faqs.question: We went through a coaching program and have a strategy document. Can SmartFirm implement it?
faqs.answer: That is exactly the kind of situation SmartFirm is built for. If you already have a strategic plan from a coaching program or advisor, we can review it and translate the relevant components into a working marketing and automation system. We may also identify opportunities to enhance the plan based on what we have seen work for other accounting firms, but we are happy to use your existing strategy as the foundation for implementation.

faqs.question: How is working with SmartFirm different from working with a practice management consultant?
faqs.answer: Practice management consultants and coaching programs typically help you develop strategy, improve processes, and adopt better business practices. SmartFirm focuses specifically on the marketing and client acquisition side, and we build and manage the technology systems that power those efforts. Think of it as the execution arm for the growth-related components of your broader practice strategy. The two can work very well together.

faqs.question: What kind of technical setup does our firm need to have before working with SmartFirm?
faqs.answer: You do not need any specific technology in place before starting with SmartFirm. Our platform provides the marketing and automation tools, and we handle all of the technical configuration. If you already use practice management software, email systems, or other business tools, we integrate with those wherever possible. The onboarding process includes a full technology assessment so we can design the system to fit seamlessly into your existing environment.

rootworks-alternative-with-implementatio.ctaTitle: Ready to Move From Strategy to a Working System?
rootworks-alternative-with-implementatio.ctaDescription: Schedule a free consultation and we will show you how SmartFirm's implementation-focused approach can turn your growth strategy into a fully operational marketing and automation system for your accounting firm.
